skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered short video creation agent with automatic scriptwriting, shot composition, and music selection for 5-120 second videos.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 534 potential issues, but after human evaluation, all findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate API client for the Pexo AI video service. External commands detected in documentation files are showing command syntax, not actual execution. Network access is limited to pexo.ai API endpoints. Environment access is for API authentication, not credential exfiltration. The skill uses shell scripts to wrap API calls, which is standard for CLI tools.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Patterns in Documentation
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flagged shell command patterns (backticks, $() syntax) in markdown reference files and SKILL.md. These are documentation showing command syntax for educational purposes, not actual code execution. The skill executes pre-written scripts via pexo-*.sh wrappers that call the Pexo API.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All shell command patterns appear in documentation context or legitimate script wrappers that make API calls to pexo.ai - no user input injection vectors exist

medium_findings.title: Network Access to External API
medium_findings.description: Skill makes network requests to pexo.ai API endpoints. This is the intended functionality of the video creation service, not data exfiltration.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network requests are to the legitimate Pexo API service at pexo.ai for video creation - documented and expected behavior

medium_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Authentication
medium_findings.description: Skill reads PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL environment variables for API authentication. This is standard API client behavior, not credential exfiltration.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Environment variables are used only for authenticating with the Pexo API - credentials stay local and are sent only to the intended service

low_findings.title: System Diagnostics in Doctor Script
low_findings.description: pexo-doctor.sh contains system reconnaissance commands (uname, date, etc.) for diagnostic purposes. This is legitimate troubleshooting functionality as documented in SKILL.md.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Diagnostic commands are for user-initiated troubleshooting, not stealth reconnaissance - explicitly mentioned in skill documentation

low_findings.title: Timestamp Generation Pattern
low_findings.description: Scanner flagged 'date +%s000' as weak crypto, but this is simply generating Unix timestamps for API request payloads, not cryptographic operations.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Unix timestamps for API request bodies are standard practice, not cryptographic operations - no actual crypto weakness present

low_findings.title: Configuration File Access
low_findings.description: Skill reads config from ~/.pexo/config directory. This is the intended configuration location for the Pexo tool.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard configuration file location for the Pexo tool - documented in SKILL.md prerequisites section

content.value_statement: Need to produce short videos for marketing or social media but lack video production skills? This skill connects Claude to Pexo AI to automatically generate 5-120 second videos with professional scriptwriting, shot composition, and music selection.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) with professional cinematography
Create videos from text prompts with automatic scriptwriting
Support multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 for different platforms
Upload reference images, videos, or audio to include in productions
Handle multi-turn conversations to refine video content
Present preview options and deliver final downloadable videos
limitations: Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be uploaded or provided directly
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex content
Requires Pexo account with sufficient credits for video generation
Does not modify existing videos - only creates new content from prompts

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Videos
use_cases.description: Create professional product advertisements by describing your product and uploading product images. Perfect for e-commerce, social media ads, and brand promotion.
use_cases.target_user: Marketers, e-commerce sellers, small business owners

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate engaging TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts by describing your content concept. Supports 9:16 vertical format for mobile-first platforms.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators, social media managers, influencers

use_cases.title: Explainer and Tutorial Videos
use_cases.description: Create educational explainer videos by describing the topic or concept. Ideal for onboarding content, tutorials, and knowledge base videos.
use_cases.target_user: Educators, trainers, documentation teams, SaaS companies

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a video about [topic description]
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - just describe what you want in plain language

prompt_templates.title: Product Video with Details
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [duration] second product video showcasing [product name]. Features to highlight: [list features]. Style: [modern, energetic, professional, etc.]
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - specify duration, features, and style

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Ad with Reference
prompt_templates.prompt: Upload your product image, then create a [duration] second Instagram Reel showcasing [product]. Target audience: [audience]. CTA: [call to action]
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - include uploaded assets and specific platform targeting

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Part Campaign
prompt_templates.prompt: First video: [concept 1]. Second video: [concept 2 connected to first]. Use consistent brand style: [style description]. Each video [duration] seconds.
prompt_templates.scenario: Expert - plan multi-video campaigns with consistent branding

output_examples.input: I want a 15 second product video for my handmade candles
output_examples.output: Video created successfully. Download URL: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/proj_xxx/assets/video.mp4. Project page: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xxx

output_examples.input: Create an Instagram Reel about sustainable fashion
output_examples.output: Video created with 9:16 aspect ratio. Download URL and project link provided. Would you like any revisions?

best_practices: Be specific about video purpose and target platform - different formats work better for TikTok vs YouTube vs brand websites
Upload reference images when possible - the AI uses them as visual references for better results
Start with simple requests first, then iterate - describe what you want changed rather than specifying all details upfront
anti_patterns: Do not specify technical parameters like frame rate, codec, or resolution - Pexo handles production quality automatically
Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style details the user did not mention - let Pexo make professional judgment calls
Do not paste URLs for images or files - download and upload them first as Pexo cannot crawl web URLs

faq.question: What platforms can I share the generated videos on?
faq.answer: Videos work on all major platforms: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn, and your website. The skill generates standard MP4 files with common codecs.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short 15-second videos typically take 15-20 minutes. Complex videos or longer durations take longer. The skill polls for completion and notifies you when ready.

faq.question: What file formats can I upload as references?
faq.answer: Supported formats: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), Videos (mp4, mov, avi), Audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac).

faq.question: Can I request revisions to the generated video?
faq.answer: Yes - use the same project ID and describe what you want changed. Pexo will generate a new version based on your feedback.

faq.question: What if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: The skill detects insufficient credits and provides a link to purchase more at pexo.ai. After adding credits, retry the failed operation.

faq.question: Does the skill support multiple languages?
faq.answer: Yes - the skill automatically replies in the same language you use. Pexo also understands prompts in multiple languages.
